questionHtml: Find the upper bound for the velocity according to this model, given that 0<s≤40 000. Give your answer to four significant figures.
markschemeHtml:
upper limit occurs when s=40000                    (M1)

Note: The M1 can be implied by 40000 substituted into their part (c)(i).

349.7 ms-1                    A1

Note: Answer must be to 4 sf.

[2 marks]

meta.title: Find the upper bound for the velocity according to this model, given that 0<s≤40 000. Give your answer to four significant figures.
